topic: There is a desk in my office with my nameplate that I never sat at, and it is always warm.
title: The Desk With My Name I Never Sat At | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a desk in my office with my name on it, and I never sat there.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty office desk with a small engraved nameplate, monitor dark, chair angled out, dim fluorescent light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My real desk is across the floor, by the windows.
scenes.image_prompt: Wide open-plan office at dusk, rows of identical desks, one desk near tall windows lit by grey light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had walked past that empty corner for two years.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet office corner with a single unused desk in shadow, carpet faintly worn around it, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One Monday a nameplate sat there. My name, spelled exactly right.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of a brass nameplate on a desk edge, engraved letters catching dim light, dust on the surface, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I laughed. Then I touched the chair.
scenes.image_prompt: An office chair seen from behind, fabric back faintly creased, soft pool of overhead light, deep shadow around, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The seat was warm. As if someone had just stood up.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty office chair seat in close detail, fabric slightly compressed, faint heat shimmer suggestion, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I came in before everyone for a week to watch it.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark empty office before dawn, single desk lamp glowing in a far corner, long shadows across carpet, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning the chair was warm. Every morning, no one was there.
scenes.image_prompt: The unused desk at dawn, chair pushed out as if just vacated, pale window light, faint grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then little things appeared. My coffee order. My handwriting on the notepad.
scenes.image_prompt: Desk surface with a paper coffee cup and an open notepad covered in scrawled handwriting, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the notepad it said, please stop sitting in my chair across the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of a notepad page with handwritten lines, pen resting on it, shadow of an unseen figure on the wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked to switch desks. They said I already had two.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty office hallway with glass-walled rooms, reflection of overhead lights stretching on, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night, from the windows, I watched myself working in the corner.
scenes.image_prompt: View across a dark office toward a far desk where a faceless silhouette sits typing, glow of one monitor, vertical 9:16 framing
